title: ballota pseudodictamnus
intro: Ballota pseudodictamnus, also known as false dittany or pseudo-dictamnus, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of iridoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ballota pseudodictamnus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies in combination with other plants for enhanced therapeutic effects.
